input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8256 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: parquet-jackson exposes relocated classes under shaded.parquet.com.fasterxml.jackson.*, so generated tests should avoid importing upstream com.fasterxml.jackson.* classes unless they are deliberately added by the test scaffold.
The reported failure appears to be a version-behavior/test-expectation issue in Jackson enum annotation handling, not missing setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No concrete extra setup is needed. The published parquet-jackson artifact is a self-contained shaded Jackson bundle with no runtime Maven dependencies, Docker-backed services, or required environment/system properties for meaningful local coverage.
